name: flutter-update-ios-xcode-versions
friendlyName: Update iOS Xcode marketing and build version
description: Updates MARKETING_VERSION and CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION in project.pbxproj (same as typical PowerShell CI snippets).
author: Andrii Petrovskyi
instanceNameFormat: Update iOS Xcode versions in project.pbxproj

inputs.name: iosProjectRoot
inputs.label: iOS project root
inputs.helpMarkDown: Folder that contains the `.xcodeproj` (for example the `ios` folder next to `pubspec.yaml`, or your parameterized ios root path).

inputs.name: xcodeprojName
inputs.label: Xcode project name
inputs.helpMarkDown: Name of the `.xcodeproj` bundle without the extension (usually `Runner` for Flutter).

inputs.name: marketingVersion
inputs.label: Marketing version
inputs.helpMarkDown: Value for MARKETING_VERSION (CFBundleShortVersionString), e.g. `1.2.3` or `${{ parameters.app_version }}`.
